categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Defensive Playbooks
categories.description: Weekly deep-dives on detection engineering, incident response, and hardening guides — written for practitioners, by practitioners.

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-60137: WordPress Core actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: WordPress Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability when a plugin or theme passes untrusted input to the parameter. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-63030 to allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-63030: WordPress Core actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: WordPress Core contains an interpretation conflict vulnerability that could allow an attacker to perform SQL Injection and achieve Remote Code Execution. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-60137.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-0770: Langflow Langflow actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Langflow contains an inclusion of functionality from untrusted control sphere vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-47392 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.9)
briefings.excerpt: PraisonAI is a multi-agent teams system. Prior to version 4.6.40 of PraisonAI, corresponding to version 1.6.40 of praisonaiagents, `execute_code()` in `praisonaiagents/tools/python_tools.py` (v1.6.37, subprocess sandbox mode) can be fully…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-47391 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: PraisonAI is a multi-agent teams system. Prior to version 4.6.40, PraisonAI's first-party A2A server example exposes an unauthenticated A2A JSON-RPC endpoint and registers a `calculate(expression)` tool implemented with Python `eval()`.…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-47393 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: PraisonAI is a multi-agent teams system. CVE-2026-44338 (GHSA-6rmh-7xcm-cpxj) documents that PraisonAI ships a code-generator (`praisonai.deploy.api.generate_api_server_code`) that emits a Flask API server with authentication disabled by…
